data.title: 国际服网页活动「Search for the Hidden Seeds!」
data.summary: [Website Event: “Search for the Hidden Seeds!”] The students have hidden a special gift just for you
data.body:
[Website Event: “Search for the Hidden Seeds!”]

The students have hidden a special gift just for you, Sensei! 🔎
Visit the link below to check out a new riddle revealed once per day, and don’t forget to claim your event rewards~

Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=3372372
Event Page: https://bluearchive.nexon.com/events/2026/02/wildhunt
#BlueArchive
